item.title: Django Create Test Fixture Data From Exist Database
item.author: Author
item.description: Command 1 python manage.py dumpdata --exclude contenttypes --exclude auth.permission --exclude authtoken.token -o test_data.json

item.title: Python Set Python Version for Virtual Environment
item.author: Author

item.title: Django Create Models From Exist Database
item.author: Author
item.description: Command 1 python manage.py inspectdb > models.py Precautions / 주의사항 You need to change something in manually. For example, you have to modify max_length in CharField from -1 to length that you want. 몇가지는 수작업으로 수정해야 합니다. 예를들어, CharField의 max_length 가 -1로 나오는데, 이부분은 수작업으로 수정해 주어야 합니다.
